base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_level_1_entrance — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 castlevania. Castle-entrance tileset — gray stone blocks, wooden drawbridge planks, archway stones, outer moat water, plant/vine details. ~8×8 tile atlas. Palette: brown/gray/green. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
